document_metadata.title: Watch: Ice comes out instead of water from frozen pipes in Kashmir
document_metadata.first_words: As the temperature drops below freezing point in #Kashmir, #WATCH ice flowing out of a pipe #kashmirwinter #ColdWave #WINTER #KashmirFiles #Trending #Video pic.twitter.com/75fs2bStpH— News9 (@News9Tweets) January 5, 2023 As the temperature drops below freezing point in #Kashmir, #WATCH ice flowing out of a pipe #kashmirwinter #ColdWave #WINTER #KashmirFiles #Trending #Video pic.twitter.com/75fs2bStpH
